title: nepeta koeieana
intro: Nepeta koeieana, also known as Koeie's catmint or Nepeta koeieana, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Nepeta koeieana include its ability to relieve digestive problems, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Nepeta koeieana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
